headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Edwards Lifesciences Stock?
summary: While Edwards Lifesciences has considerably underperformed the broader market over the past 52 weeks, Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
